svg.title: Playlab Rostering Integration Architecture v2.0
svg.desc: Architecture diagram v2.0: three source systems feed a rostering middleware; six implementation phases including OAuth/SSO and country auth adapters; a global AI-audited compliance layer with four configurable categories and an AI audit engine; roster-able entity types split into public and private entities with configurable sub-entity composition.
svg.text: Global compliance layer — AI-audited · configurable per country, region, state, and subdivision
Roster-able entity types — entity composition is independently configurable per organization
Govt. Agencies · Libraries · State Ed. Bodies
All sub-entities configurable per org type
e.g. libraries roster learners, not students
e.g. state ed. orgs roster districts/sub-entities
Charter Schools · Private Schools · Tutoring Ctrs.
All sub-entities configurable per org type
e.g. tutoring centers roster learners only
e.g. private districts include sub-entity orgs
Playlab Rostering Integration Architecture · v2.0 · April 2026
